title: Add System event type and renumber, refresh events
body: Also, re-add locking to file eventer Write() to protect against concurrent events.

LGTM, but tests aren't happy.  I think it's a flake.
Pushed another commit that should make using journald a lot smoother - no hard failures on undecodable events
